message:
Running command: # EXCELLENT! 254 violations at 70% of iteration 3! Down from 83,662 → 15,778 → 254!

ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
